mapper.select: SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY project_id DESC
SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project WHERE project_type = #{projectType} ORDER BY project_id DESC
SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project WHERE deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY deadline ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE Project SET title = #{title}, promotion = #{promotion}, project_type = #{projectType}, deadline = #{deadline}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason} WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project ORDER BY project_id DESC

SELECT project_id, title, promotion, project_type, deadline, rejection_reason, create_at, user_id, product_id FROM Project WHERE deadline BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY deadline ASC
